description_long: This humanoid robot features a robust, rounded red body with a metallic finish and prominent, bulbous shoulders. Its torso is broad and armored, with a green-tinted, glass-like panel on the upper chest and white technical markings, including the text 'RocketMan G.' The arms are thick and cylindrical, ending in conical forearms, while the legs are short and sturdy, with wide, bell-shaped lower limbs and tripod-like feet. The back of the robot is reinforced with additional plating and mechanical details, suggesting durability and strength. The overall design is industrial and functional, with visible joints and seams indicating articulated movement.
description: A red, metallic humanoid robot with a broad armored torso, thick articulated limbs, and a green-tinted chest panel.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's wide chest, green panel, technical markings, and symmetrical, conical limbs.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the cylindrical arm and leg, with the rounded shoulder and metallic joints visible.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals reinforced back plating, mechanical details, and the tripod-like feet structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other, showing the arm and leg profile with rounded and conical shapes.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms slightly angled outward and legs set apart, torso facing forward, and head integrated into the upper chest.
attribute_clothing_style: No clothing; exterior consists of integrated red metallic panels with some painted markings and a green-tinted chest covering.
attribute_facial_features: No traditional facial features; the front upper torso has a green-tinted panel and circular elements that may suggest eyes, but no mouth or nose is present.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have visible rotary and hinge joints at the shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees, allowing for a moderate range of motion; limbs appear robust and somewhat rigid.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Possible visual sensors on the front chest panel; no other sensors are clearly visible.
